seoDescription: A practical field checklist for selecting, deploying, and managing rental generator packages on active industrial sites.

hero.heading: Generator Rental Best Practice
hero.body: A practical field checklist for selecting, deploying, and managing rental generator packages on active industrial sites.

sections.title: Rental Planning Checklist
sections.body: Start with load accuracy, site access, duty profile, and operating window to avoid oversizing, fuel waste, and avoidable callouts.

cards.title: Load Profile Definition
cards.description: Capture starting currents, critical circuits, and future capacity margin before selecting package size.

cards.title: Site Logistics
cards.description: Confirm crane access, cable runs, noise constraints, and refueling pathways before mobilisation.

cards.title: Risk Controls
cards.description: Plan transfer testing, backup pathways, and escalation protocols for critical operating windows.

sections.title: Operating Standards In The Field
sections.body: Strong outcomes come from clear handover documentation, regular inspection routines, and measured performance reviews.

cards.title: Commissioning Handover
cards.description: Use a documented handover process with test records, contact pathways, and practical operating instructions.

cards.title: Performance Tracking
cards.description: Track runtime, fuel consumption, and alarm history to identify optimization opportunities early.

cards.title: Procurement Review
cards.description: Compare short-term hire against ownership horizon at project milestones, not only at project start.
